Uses of Class
de.uka.ilkd.key.ldt.LDT

  • Packages that use LDT 
    Package Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.java
    This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.ldt
    This package contains the "language data types" (LDTs) of KeY.

    • Uses of LDT in de.uka.ilkd.key.java

      Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.java that return LDT 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      LDT TypeConverter.getModelFor(Sort s) 
      Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.java that return types with arguments of type LDT 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ImmutableList<LDT> TypeConverter.getModels() 

    • Uses of LDT in de.uka.ilkd.key.ldt

      Subclasses of LDT in de.uka.ilkd.key.ldt 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  BooleanLDT
      This class inherits from LDT and implements all method that are necessary to handle the primitive type boolean.
      class  CharListLDT 
      class  DoubleLDT
      Complete this class if you want to add support for the Java double type.
      class  FloatLDT
      Complete this class if you want to add support for the Java float type.
      class  FreeLDT
      Generic data type, which has no predefined theory.
      class  HeapLDT
      LDT responsible for the "Heap" sort, and the associated "Field" sort.
      class  IntegerLDT
      This class inherits from LDT and implements all method that are necessary to handle integers, shorts and bytes.
      class  LocSetLDT 
      class  MapLDT
      LDT for maps.
      class  PermissionLDT 
      class  RealLDT
      Complete this class if you want to add support for the JML \real type.
      class  SeqLDT 
      Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.ldt that return types with arguments of type LDT 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static java.util.Map<Name,LDT> LDT.getNewLDTInstances(Services s)
